wide_fallback._notes: Placeholder FOV -- Johnson flagged 95-105 as the plausible range, needs a render test to confirm image quality/coverage tradeoff before treating as final. Pitch intentionally not overridden here -- shares camera.pitch (+4) per spec ("keep pitch fixed unless a venue later needs a separate wide pitch").

play_area._notes: Copied from ball_tracker/venue_mask.json (commit f6b969a, frame 300, 19 points, human-calibrated by Johnson for MOG2 masking, 3 player-shirt false points removed). playcam-owned independent copy -- ball_tracker/venue_mask.json is not read or modified at runtime by playcam scripts.

_notes: St Margarets, tested 2026-07-02 against equirect_trim.mp4 (t=30-38s). yaw=0 faces active central pitch area. pitch sweep: -20 pointed at empty turf, -8 clipped players at top, +4 centred play without cutting feet. Pitch sign convention is mount-dependent -- re-test per venue, do not assume +4 transfers.
